recommendations.title: The Faculty
recommendations.overview: When some very creepy things start happening around school, the kids at Herrington High make the chilling discovery that confirms their worst suspicions: their teachers really are from another planet!

recommendations.title: Serial Teachers
recommendations.overview: With only 12 percent of its pupils obtaining their baccalaureate, Jules Ferry High School is the worst school in France. The Inspector of Schools has already exhausted all the conventional means to raise standards at the school and he has no choice b

recommendations.title: Best Worst Movie
recommendations.overview: A look at the making of the film Troll 2 (1990) and its journey from being crowned the "worst film of all time" to a cherished cult classic.

recommendations.title: P.R.O.F.S.
recommendations.overview: A clique of four young teachers at a high school looks critically at their colleagues. To avoid falling in the same routine, they bring new ideas into the school lessons and play little games and pranks in their spare time -- sometimes get even more

recommendations.title: I Love You in All Languages of the World
recommendations.overview: A divorced high school PE teacher falls in love with a single mom before learning that her daughter is the student who's been hitting on him between classes.

recommendations.title: Detachment
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of three weeks in the lives of several high school teachers, administrators and students through the eyes of substitute teacher, Henry Barthes. Henry roams from school to school, imparting modes of knowledge, but never staying long enough

recommendations.title: Graduation Day
recommendations.overview: After the death of a high school track star during a race, a mysterious killer in a fencing mask begins murdering her friends and teachers.

recommendations.title: Another Round
recommendations.overview: Four stagnant high school teachers decide to test out a theory that maintaining a constant level of intoxication will improve their overall lives.

recommendations.title: Cado dalle nubi
recommendations.overview: An aspiring singer from southern Italy who's just been dumped moves north to Milan, where he falls in love and enters a TV singing competition show.

recommendations.title: Nowhere to Be Found
recommendations.overview: A mother's worst nightmare comes true when her teenage daughter goes missing.
